page: Microsoft Azure NV4ads_V710_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NVadsV710v5 server family. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance type incorporates a fractional GPU configuration, providing 0.1667 of an AMD V710 GPU with 4 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is bundled, offering 275 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is premium storage capable.

The fractional GPU allocation allows for resource density and qualitative cost efficiency, making GPU-accelerated resources accessible without the cost of a full dedicated GPU. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring moderate graphics acceleration, such as virtual desktops, entry-level 3D rendering, and lightweight GPU-assisted compute tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure NV4ads_V710_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine within the NVadsV710v5 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a fractional GPU allocation of 0.1667 AMD V710 GPU, providing 4 GB of dedicated VRAM. Additionally, it includes 275 GB of local storage and supports premium storage configurations. This resource density offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads by partitioning physical GPU resources. The hardware profile is suited for virtual desktop infrastructure, light 3D visualization, and entry-level GPU-assisted compute tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV4ads_V710_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, a fractional AMD V710 GPU with 4 GB VRAM, and 275 GB of local storage.

tagline: A cost-efficient virtual machine featuring fractional GPU acceleration, dedicated AMD processors, and bundled local storage for entry-level graphics workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
16.0 GB system memory with 4.0 GB per core
Fractional AMD V710 GPU with 4 GB of dedicated VRAM
275 GB of bundled local storage with premium storage capability
Suited for virtual desktops and light GPU-assisted compute
